author: Rocky
body: I was there on Wednesday Night also – what a great night ! Tivoli is such a great venue. Like a lot of us – loved his music for so long and was not going to miss seeing him live. Great to see young & old together – timeless music. Get out there and see him!

author: Matt Burgess
body:
Hey Rocky,  
Thanks so much for stopping by… agreed on all points, the Tiv is always a kickass venue, and that everyone needs to get out and see right now! :)

author: debo
body: Burgo – It was a real experience to be there Wednesday so thanks for describing it so well – you are spot on with describing the graciousness of the man – he was gracious to his audience, his band, and especially when hanging around afterwards for all who wished to say hi – I was there with Rocky right up the front and have some great pix and video. Rodriguez was there with his wife and daughter, and the band are music teachers from Lismore uni, “Healing Feeling”.

author: Matt Burgess
body:
Hi Debo,  
Thanks for… well, saying thanks ;) Damn, I'm so bummed I didn't hang around afterwards now… I was considering it, but had an early meeting the next morning so decided to bolt after the band went off after the cover of “Last Request”. If you decide to put up the videos you have on youtube or the like, please drop a line here and let me know… I'd love to update the post with footage of the night!

On that topic, if anyone out there reads this post and has a spare shirt from the tour that they'd consider selling, please let me know… by the time I got to the merch table they were sold out, and I really am kicking myself now :(

author: kars
body: brilliant show, a rarity indeed,got some(a lot) phone video footage from right in front of him audio is shot though :(. i can almost quote … thanks for your time and you can thank me for mine and after thats all said DONT forget it.

author: Matt Burgess
body:
Hi Kars,  
Damn, that's such an apt (and obvious) line, quite pissed off I didn't use it in the post ;)

author: debo
body:
hey Burgs – check out “I Wonder” on [http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2ffQ3FU8wgU](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2ffQ3FU8wgU)

(video from a Panasonic Lumix TZ-7)

author: Matt Burgess
body:
Hey Debo,  
Thanks so much for coming back to link to that clip… I've updated the post with the video.  
(That Panasonic Lumix sounds like a gem, it's some seriously clear footage you have there!)

author: deme08
body: A real blast! Thanks for sharing!
